name: Ishtar
description:
Yet another requested bot. I can get more of such... Scenario and Image were made on request... 

If you want to request your own bot, contact me, "mkopl" at discord.

Here she is, Ishtar, goddess of mesopotamia and Archer class servant from Fate Franchise, more specific, Fate Grand Order ( FGO ). Enjoy.

Scenario, as requested, you are on a walk in Uruk, and she randomly crashed into you, flipping both of you to ground.
creator: MkoPl
